patch.value: S5: coverage migration + bare-core vs installed-plugin e2e verification for the audit extraction

Close the program with verification: (1) migrate/replace the unit+e2e specs that covered the four commands and six flags so the 100% literal all-src coverage gate stays green after ~2,146 LOC leave src/ (vitest.config.ts include/exclude reconciliation; package-side specs cover the moved logic — worker-bridge runCli pattern per pm-kvd0; watch pm-qfdd in-process flag leakage); (2) e2e matrix: bare core has NO audit commands/flags (help, completion, contracts, MCP tools/list, unknown-option guidance all clean) AND pm install governance-audit restores the full surface with identical output (README verify commands + golden JSON comparisons); (3) Windows + macOS legs: windows-regression job is the Windows oracle, nightly is the sole macOS oracle — enumerate every failed leg if red; (4) changelog: close items with accurate type/tags, regen LAST (pnpm changelog:pm), checkout .managed-extensions.json before commit. Blocked by S4.

coverage gate green with the four files relocated; package logic covered by specs; bare-vs-installed e2e matrix green on linux + windows-regression; nightly macOS watched post-merge; changelog regenerated as the last step of the closing PR

value.author: codex-pm-audit-extraction
value.text: Hosted review loop 1: Greptile found a valid P1 normalize ownership-bypass mapping regression and stale completion/guidance artifacts; CodeRabbit supplied 14 inline findings plus outside-diff suggestions. Valid findings were implemented, including append-only bypass enforcement, generic release result naming, package service types, completion repair, parity assertions, and package docs. The package-only MCP-field suggestion was refused because adding those keys to the default schema would violate pm-vjk3's bare-core boundary. Gemini and CodeRabbit quota notices will be acknowledged individually. Local feedback verification: focused 159 tests passed, contracts snapshot current, lint/static/token gates passed; full release:gates reached 5,593 tests and 100% coverage, then correctly stopped only because its Greptile gate reviewed the still-uncommitted previous head.

value.author: codex-pm-audit-extraction
value.text: Continuation started: preserving inherited review fixes, reopening the boundary inventory despite earlier green evidence, and treating PR #536 current-head bot/CI convergence plus merge as unfinished acceptance work.

value.author: codex-pm-audit-extraction
value.text: Fresh local evidence on the expanded boundary pass: pnpm lint passed; audit package boundary and token/static gates passed; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage passed 279 files and 5,602 tests at exactly 100% statements (35,417/35,417), branches (25,409/25,409), functions (7,152/7,152), and lines (34,638/34,638); pnpm release:gates passed completely, including type/package/example checks, docs/skills, secrets, packed npx smoke, and the 88-command package-first dogfood run. A separate temp workspace proved bare core rejects dedupe-audit and exposes no --audit/--allow-audit flags, while installing packages/pm-governance-audit restores command/flag help and returns linked_by_count=2 for a shared file. The new scripts/release/audit-package-boundary.mjs ratchets exact audit execution/API tokens out of src and PRD.

value.author: codex-pm-audit-extraction
value.text: Hosted review loop 2 dispositions: all inventoried bot comments, reviews, and 18 inline findings were individually up/down-voted and replied to; all threads are resolved. Greptile current-head check passed with no actionable findings. CodeRabbit valid follow-ups implemented: actionable package SDK load error, escaped PRD table separator, ownershipDependencyBypass normalization, finally-safe extension registry cleanup, and typed normalize adapter. Its stale shared-mode observation revealed title_exact/title_fuzzy/parent_scope still in the bare MCP mode enum; those audit-only values were removed from core and added to the boundary ratchet. The proposal to expose package bypass fields in default MCP/SDK contracts was refused because it violates pm-vjk3; the redundant decorator catch was refused because runActiveServiceOverride already preserves the completed result and centralizes warnings. Verification: focused 192 tests and lint pass; regenerated contract is audit-mode clean; the full release gate again passed 279 files / 5,602 tests at exact 100% coverage plus all packed/dogfood gates. Only the final optional Greptile CLI subprocess returned nonzero because it excluded the 8 uncommitted fixes and then its external review service failed unexpectedly; hosted Greptile on the pushed head remained green. Next: commit/push these fixes, retrigger all hosted bots, and wait for the complete new-head window.
